summary: Comprehensive testing of SignaturePopup canvas orientation change fix. All tests passed - canvas drawing works in portrait mode, landscape mode, and after multiple orientation rotations. The normalized coordinates (nx, ny) system correctly preserves drawn paths when viewport changes.
seed_data_creation: Test signatures created: SaveTest User123 on OT #358
context_for_next_testing_agent: SignaturePopup canvas orientation change fix verified working. The fix includes: 1) resize/orientationchange event listeners that reinitialize canvas with new dimensions, 2) normalized coordinates (nx, ny in 0-1 range) to preserve paths across resize, 3) pathsDataRef for consistent path data. Test flow: Login as pedro/password -> /technical-reports -> OTs tab -> Click OT #358 -> Scroll to 'Assinaturas do Cliente' -> Click 'Nova Assinatura' -> Fill name -> Click 'Abrir para Assinar' -> SignaturePopup opens. To test rotation, change viewport from portrait (390x844) to landscape (844x390).

SignaturePopup_portrait_mode.details: Canvas drawing works correctly in portrait mode (390x844 viewport). Canvas size: 358x691. Drawing responds immediately to mouse/touch input.

SignaturePopup_landscape_mode.details: Canvas drawing works correctly in landscape mode (844x390 viewport). Canvas size: 812x237. Drawing remains responsive after orientation change.

orientation_change_path_preservation.details: Paths drawn in portrait mode are preserved when rotating to landscape and vice versa. Normalized coordinates (nx, ny) successfully scale paths to new canvas dimensions.

multiple_rotation_cycles.details: Canvas remains responsive after multiple portrait->landscape->portrait rotations. All previously drawn paths are preserved.

limpar_clear_button.details: Clicking 'Limpar' button (data-testid='signature-clear-btn') successfully clears all drawn content from canvas.

guardar_save_button.details: Clicking 'Guardar' button (data-testid='signature-save-btn') saves signature and returns to AssinaturaModal with 'Assinatura capturada' indicator.

close_x_button.details: Clicking 'X' button (data-testid='signature-close-btn') closes popup and preserves drawn paths for later use.

signature_final_save.details: Full save flow works: Draw -> Guardar -> 'Guardar Assinatura' button -> Success toast 'Assinatura digital guardada com sucesso!'. Signature appears in list.

ui_elements_verified.header_elements: Name display (truncated on mobile), Limpar button, Guardar button, X button
ui_elements_verified.footer_elements: Instruction text: 'Desenhe a assinatura com o dedo ou rato'
ui_elements_verified.canvas_area: White canvas with dashed border, fullscreen layout
